title: The Stellarium Book
content:
# The Stellarium Book

Welcome to the foundation of objective reality and wealth creation.

## Chapter 1: The Law

Do Good. Make money. Have Fun.

This simple triad forms the basis of all operational excellence. It is fundamentally impossible to construct a sustainable, high-velocity enterprise if any of these three elements is lacking.

(This is a sample excerpt of the book.)

title: The Architecture of Prosperity
content:
# The Architecture of Prosperity

How do we engineer society so that the most profitable action is also the most altruistic action? We call this Structural Incentive Engineering.

**Core Tenets**
1. Align incentives.
2. Decentralize execution.
3. Centralize vision.

title: On Pragmatism
content:
# On Pragmatism

Pragmatism over dogma. We seek what works.
